title: Hurry Up! (faster furnaces)
description: Makes furnaces (and in the future other items) faster! like 3 times and 6 times faster for the furnace and blast furnace
body:
Ever wanted furnaces to be faster but dont want to bother with those pesky mods that add new furnaces? Dont worry! I got the mod just for you, it makes the 2 furnaces in the game faster by a lot. like 3 times for the normal furnace and 6 times for the blast furnace.


<details>
<summary>Feature list</summary>
  
- Blast furnaces are 6 times faster
- Normal furnaces are 3 times faster
</details>



<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>
  
- Configurable times
- Faster hoppers
- idk what else.

</details>

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) where this mod was even requested! You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
